name: Nethershade
description:
Activate 2 (manipulate)

Distilled from the Netherworld, this oily substance imposes tenebrous effects. The enfeebled condition from nethershade lasts for 24 hours.

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and ] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage, ] damage, and Enfeebled 1 (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage, ] damage, and Enfeebled 2 (1 round)
